task_description: Find a recipe for chocolate chip cookies and note the total preparation time.
Search for hotels in Paris for 2 adults checking in on 2024-06-01 and checking out on 2024-06-03.
Search for a Kindle Paperwhite and find its current price and customer rating.
Find the article about the Eiffel Tower and note the year it was completed.
Navigate to the trending repositories page and find the top trending repository for today.
Calculate the integral of x^2 from 0 to 3 and record the result.
Find the top post in the r/worldnews subreddit and note its title and score.
Find the current NBA standings and list the top 3 teams in the Eastern Conference.
Get directions from Times Square New York to Central Park and note the walking distance.
Find the movie Inception and note its director, release year, and IMDb rating.
